sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: A Closer Look at DIVO: An Active Approach to Dividend Enhancement
feed.summary: The Amplify CWP Enhanced Dividend Income ETF (DIVO) utilizes an active covered call strategy on a focused portfolio of high-quality, large-cap stocks to generate an attractive dividend yield, currently around 4.7%. Its unique approach, which involves writing covered calls on individual stock positions rather than an entire index, aims to both enhance income and preserve capital appreciation potential. This strategy has consistently attracted significant institutional capital, highlighting its appeal in the income-ETF market.

feed.title: Griffon Shareholders Back Board, Executive Pay and Auditor
feed.summary: At its 2026 Annual Meeting, Griffon shareholders overwhelmingly supported the election of 11 directors to the board, approved executive compensation on an advisory basis, and ratified Grant Thornton LLP as the independent accounting firm. With 88% of common stock represented, these decisions signal strong confidence in the company's leadership, pay structure, and financial oversight. An analyst from Tipranks has a Buy rating on GFF stock with a $115.00 price target.

feed.title: Cemex Executes MXN$110 Million Share Buyback Under Ongoing Program
feed.summary: Cemex (CX) repurchased 5.05 million CPOs for approximately MXN$110 million on February 18, 2026, as part of an ongoing shareholder-approved buyback program. This transaction, totaling about U.S.$6.41 million, underscores the company's commitment to capital management, shareholder returns, and balance-sheet optimization. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates CX as "Outperform" due to solid financial performance and supportive earnings guidance.

feed.title: Kellanova executive Mohit Anand named President of Snacks Division at Campbell’s
feed.summary: Mohit Anand, formerly of Kellanova (now Mars Snacking), has been appointed Executive Vice President and President of the Snacks division at Campbell's, effective February 23, 2026. He will oversee prominent snack brands like Goldfish and Pepperidge Farm, reporting directly to CEO Mick Beekhuizen. Anand's role involves driving long-term growth and margin enhancement, leveraging his extensive CPG experience to accelerate change and unlock the division's potential.
